name: Your precious cats!!
description:
Another bot as promised ya'll, this time being Demi and Sasha as cats instead of just being the good ol' loafs!!

Might drop a new bot around friday or saturday, i don't know honestly but i won't be disappointing!

I'll take requests from ya'll and see what i can do to make 'em become true!! But i won't be doing bots that are multiple that much bc i'll definitely struggle trying to think of the scenario and such. Also making the bot limited because they're both cats and are also +18 to avoid getting into issues with the devs.
creator: Tokisaki_Shimura
